desc: DISCLAIMER - lab / authorized testing only, tool owner not responsible for misuse. evil twin attack, 4 steps - (1) enable monitor mode (2) find the target network's bssid/channel/essid (3) deauth clients off the real ap so they look for a network to reconnect to (4) stand up a fake ap using the same essid so victims connect to it instead
